title: BHIVE Workspace is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: BHIVE Workspace is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
BHIVE Workspace, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BHIVE Workspace:
BHIVE Workspace is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BHIVE Workspace!
